Klasse Sphere

java.lang.Object
raytracer.Sphere
public class Sphere extends Object
Represents a Sphere that can be placed in the 3D scene with the given size and material properties.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    final Vector3d
    center
     
    final Material
    material
     
    final double
    radius
     

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Sphere(Vector3d center, double radius, Material material)
    Creates a new Sphere at the center position, with the given radius and specified material.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Color
    diffuseShading(Vector3d normal, Vector3d light)
    Calculates the diffuse color depending on the angle between the normal vector and the light position and the diffuse color specified in the material.
    double
    intersection(Ray ray)
    Checks if the given ray intersects with the Sphere and if so returns the closest intersection point from the rays origin.
    double[]
    makeUVs(Vector3d normal)
    Calculates the uv-coordinates for a sphere depending on the normal vector.
    Vector3d
    normal(Vector3d position)
    Calculates the normal vector at the given position.
    Color
    shading(Vector3d position, Light lightSource, Vector3d view)
    Calculates the diffuse and specular contribution to the shading.
    Color
    specularShading(Vector3d normal, Vector3d light, Vector3d view)
    Calculates the specular color depending on the angle between the normal vector, the light position and the view direction and the specular shininess and specular intensity specified in the material.
    String
    toString()
     

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • center

      public final Vector3d center

    • radius

      public final double radius

    • material

      public final Material material

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Sphere

      public Sphere(Vector3d center, double radius, Material material)
      Creates a new Sphere at the center position, with the given radius and specified material.
      Parameter:
      center - the position of the sphere origin.
      radius - the radius of the sphere.
      material - the material the sphere should be rendered with.

  • Methodendetails

    • intersection

      public double intersection(Ray ray)
      Checks if the given ray intersects with the Sphere and if so returns the closest intersection point from the rays origin.
      Parameter:
      ray - the position of the sphere origin.
      Gibt zurück:
      the closest point of intersection with the ray, returns -1 when no intersection occurs.

    • normal

      public Vector3d normal(Vector3d position)
      Calculates the normal vector at the given position.
      Parameter:
      position - the position the normal vector should be calculated at.
      Gibt zurück:
      the normal vector at the given position.

    • diffuseShading

      public Color diffuseShading(Vector3d normal, Vector3d light)
      Calculates the diffuse color depending on the angle between the normal vector and the light position and the diffuse color specified in the material.
      Parameter:
      normal - the normal vector.
      light - the light position.
      Gibt zurück:
      the diffuse color.

    • specularShading

      public Color specularShading(Vector3d normal, Vector3d light, Vector3d view)
      Calculates the specular color depending on the angle between the normal vector, the light position and the view direction and the specular shininess and specular intensity specified in the material.
      Parameter:
      normal - the normal vector.
      light - the light position.
      view - the view direction.
      Gibt zurück:
      the diffuse color.

    • shading

      public Color shading(Vector3d position, Light lightSource, Vector3d view)
      Calculates the diffuse and specular contribution to the shading.
      Parameter:
      position - the position on the sphere.
      lightSource - the light source.
      view - the view direction.
      Gibt zurück:
      the combined color for diffuse and specular lighting.

    • makeUVs

      public double[] makeUVs(Vector3d normal)
      Calculates the uv-coordinates for a sphere depending on the normal vector.
      Parameter:
      normal - the normal vector.
      Gibt zurück:
      the normalized uv-coordinates.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      toString in Klasse Object
